translations.en: I have the chance to visit Paris.
translations.es: Tengo la oportunidad de visitar París.
translations.de: Ich habe die Möglichkeit, Paris zu besuchen.
translations.ru: У меня есть возможность посетить Париж.
translations.pt: Tenho a oportunidade de visitar Paris.
translations.vi: Tôi có cơ hội đến thăm Paris.
translations.nl: Ik heb de kans om Parijs te bezoeken.
translations.uk: У мене є можливість відвідати Париж.
translations.hi: मुझे पेरिस जाने का मौका मिला है।
translations.el: Έχω την ευκαιρία να επισκεφτώ το Παρίσι.
translations.nb: Jeg har mulighet til å besøke Paris.
translations.id: Saya punya kesempatan untuk mengunjungi Paris.
translations.sv: Jag har möjlighet att besöka Paris.
translations.da: Jeg har mulighed for at besøge Paris.
translations.ja: パリを訪れる機会があります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular present of ‘avoir’ used as a lexical verb; subject clitic ‘je’ is elided as ‘J’ and attached to the verb.
Noun ‘occasion’ with elided definite article ‘l’ (le/la) attached; direct object of ‘J’ai’.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement (‘de’ + infinitive) after ‘occasion’; marks the action afforded by the opportunity.
Infinitive verb governed by ‘de’; denotes the action: ‘de visiter’.
Proper noun; direct object of the infinitive ‘visiter’.

sentences.target: C’est une belle occasion pour nous.

translations.fr: C’est une belle occasion pour nous.
translations.en: It’s a great opportunity for us.
translations.es: Es una gran oportunidad para nosotros.
translations.de: Das ist eine gute Gelegenheit für uns.
translations.it: È una bella opportunità per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我们来说是个好机会。
translations.yue: 對我哋嚟講係個好機會。
translations.pt: É uma ótima oportunidade para nós.
translations.tr: Bu bizim için harika bir fırsat.
translations.vi: Đây là cơ hội tuyệt vời cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Dit is een mooie kans voor ons.
translations.hi: यह हमारे लिए एक बढ़िया मौका है।
translations.el: Είναι μια υπέροχη ευκαιρία για εμάς.
translations.nb: Dette er en god mulighet for oss.
translations.id: Ini adalah kesempatan bagus bagi kami.
translations.sv: Det är en bra möjlighet för oss.
translations.ro: Este o oportunitate grozavă pentru noi.
translations.cs: Je to pro nás skvělá příležitost.
translations.da: Det er en god mulighed for os.
translations.ja: 私たちにとって絶好の機会です。

tokens.explanation: Copular ‘est’ (from ‘être’) with clitic ‘C’ (ce) attached; introduces a predicate nominal.
Indefinite feminine singular article; determines ‘occasion’.
Attributive adjective modifying ‘occasion’; agrees in gender and number (feminine singular).
Predicate noun complement of the copula (‘C’est … occasion’).
Preposition introducing a beneficiary phrase.
Strong (tonic) pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Il cherche une voiture d’occasion pas chère.
sentences.reading: /il ʃɛʁʃ yn vwa.tyʁ dɔka.zjɔ̃ pa ʃɛʁ/

translations.fr: Il cherche une voiture d’occasion pas chère.
translations.ipa: /il ʃɛʁʃ yn vwa.tyʁ dɔka.zjɔ̃ pa ʃɛʁ/
translations.en: He’s looking for a cheap used car.
translations.es: Está buscando un coche de segunda mano barato.
translations.de: Er sucht ein günstiges gebrauchtes Auto.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在找一辆便宜的二手车。
translations.yue: 佢喺度搵一架平嘅二手車。
translations.pt: Ele está procurando um carro usado barato.
translations.he: הוא מחפש רכב יד שנייה זול.
translations.tr: Ucuz bir ikinci el araba arıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang tìm một chiếc ô tô cũ giá rẻ.
translations.ar: إنه يبحث عن سيارة مستعملة رخيصة.
translations.nl: Hij zoekt een goedkope tweedehands auto.
translations.hi: वह एक सस्ती सेकेंड-हैंड कार ढूंढ रहा है।
translations.nb: Han leter etter en billig bruktbil.
translations.id: Dia sedang mencari mobil bekas yang murah.
translations.sv: Han letar efter en billig begagnad bil.
translations.da: Han leder efter en billig brugt bil.
translations.ja: 彼は安い中古車を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun.
3rd person singular present indicative; main verb of the clause.
Indefinite feminine singular article; determines ‘voiture’.
Common noun; direct object of ‘cherche’.
Noun ‘occasion’ preceded by elided preposition ‘d’ (de); forms the prepositional complement ‘voiture d’occasion’ meaning ‘second-hand car’.
Negation particle used adverbially (often without ‘ne’ in colloquial speech); modifies ‘chère’.
Adjective agreeing in feminine singular with ‘voiture’; ‘pas chère’ = ‘not expensive’.

sentences.target: On profite de l’occasion pour déjeuner.

translations.fr: On profite de l’occasion pour déjeuner.
translations.en: We’re taking the opportunity to have lunch.
translations.de: Wir nutzen die Gelegenheit, um zu Mittag zu essen.
translations.he: אנחנו מנצלים את ההזדמנות לאכול צהריים.
translations.tr: Öğle yemeği yemek için fırsatı değerlendiriyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tranh thủ cơ hội để ăn trưa.
translations.nl: We grijpen de gelegenheid aan om te lunchen.
translations.hi: हम इस मौके का फायदा उठाकर दोपहर का खाना खा रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Korzystamy z okazji, żeby zjeść obiad.
translations.el: Εκμεταλλευόμαστε την ευκαιρία για να φάμε μεσημεριανό.
translations.nb: Vi benytter anledningen til å spise lunsj.
translations.id: Kami memanfaatkan kesempatan untuk makan siang.
translations.sv: Vi passar på att äta lunch.
translations.ro: Profităm de ocazie ca să luăm prânzul.
translations.da: Vi benytter lejligheden til at spise frokost.
translations.ja: この機会を利用して昼食をとります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (‘one/we’); triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
3rd person singular present; used with the preposition ‘de’ (‘profiter de’).
Preposition required by ‘profiter’; introduces the complement.
Noun with elided definite article ‘l’ attached; object of the preposition ‘de’.
Preposition introducing an infinitive of purpose.
Infinitive verb; expresses purpose (‘pour déjeuner’).
